details: Starting implementation. Read op_design.md: 3 TDD stages (mean_subtract, variance_normalize, affine_transform). Input: bfloat16 RM interleaved. 12 CBs total: c_0 through c_5 plus c_16 and c_24 through c_29. Work unit = 1 tile-row = 32 RM sticks. Kernels: reader (TensorAccessor + prepare_reduce_scaler), compute (9 phases: tilize, reduce, sub, square, reduce, add_eps, rsqrt, mul, mul, add, untilize), writer (TensorAccessor + 32-stick extraction).

All 6 integration tests pass. Fixed issues: (1) element_size() does not exist on ttnn.Tensor - computed from tile_size / (32*32). (2) CoreRangeSet is not iterable - use contains() API. (3) ttnn/cpp/ttnn/tensor/accessor/tensor_accessor.hpp does not exist - removed from stubs. (4) binary_op_helpers.hpp does not exist - removed from stubs. Stage test imports verified.
